title: SimpleBackport
description: Backport of new minecraft features to 1.12.2
body:
# Now mod is in a very early stage of development
In future I plan to add more things to a mod

# Content
## Blocks
* Hanging signs -> down => can be placed under block, break if block is broken
                                  side   => can be placed on the side of block, not break if block is broken
* Chain => Can be place as log (over X, Y or Z axis), metal, need pickaxe to break
* Signs -> up => Similar to standard up sign, has another texture 
                   side => Similar to  standard sign, has another texture 

## Items
* Chain => crafted from iron ingot and two iron nuggets (get 6 chains)
* Hanging sign => crafted from 6 planks and 2 chains (get 3 signs)
* Signs => can be recrafted to standard sign, oak can be crafted from standard sign,
                  craft similar to standard sign craft. 

## Commands
* locatebiome => locates given  biome in some radius near player
  * locatebiome list => give list of all biomes
